overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a large backpack walking along a muddy mountain path in a foggy, desolate landscape. The scene features utility poles with power lines, rocky terrain, and distant misty mountains, rendered with high-fidelity game engine graphics typical of Death Stranding.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet muddy path toward a utility pole, carrying a large backpack

entered.detail: tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and suspended power lines running along the path
steep rocky cliff wall bordering the left side of the trail
single power line stretching between poles along the mountain path
misty mountain peaks visible through the haze in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow muddy mountain trail bordered by a rocky cliff on the left and open misty valleys on the right. A utility pole with power lines stands ahead on the path, while sparse vegetation dots the landscape under an overcast, hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail passing utility pole with fence line

events.description: wooden fence becomes visible on the right side of the path in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing the utility pole as it moves from left to right across the field of view

entered.detail: low wooden fence posts running along the right side of the path
ruined buildings or structures visible through the mist ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the utility pole, which moves across the frame from left to right as the path opens slightly. A wooden fence appears on the right horizon, and distant ruined structures become visible through the fog ahead, while the rocky cliff recedes into the background.

events.description: utility pole passes out of view behind the character as the path continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant ruined structures as the utility pole falls behind

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the utility pole, which exits the frame behind, while approaching the ruined structures ahead. The wooden fence on the right grows more prominent as the terrain opens up, revealing more of the desolate mountain landscape under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate mountain trail that gradually opens from a narrow cliffside path into a wide, ruined landscape. It begins with the character walking a muddy track bordered by a rocky cliff and misty valleys under a hazy, overcast sky. As the character advances, the camera passes a utility pole that slides across the frame, causing the rocky cliff to recede and revealing a wooden fence and distant ruins emerging through the fog. The scene then expands further as the utility pole exits the frame, bringing the ruined structures and the weathered fence into sharper focus. Finally, the terrain opens up completely, exposing the full scale of the desolate mountain environment.
